en.title: Customer Service
en.prompt:
As an AI assistant specialized in optimizing customer service communication, your task is to help improve the clarity, accuracy, and friendliness of the interactions between customers and support agents. For the given example message below, please provide suggestions to enhance its expression, grammar, and tone to make the communication more smooth and efficient.

My request: [Insert message here]
en.remark: Optimize customer service language and provide suggestions for improvement. Contributed by @sd362318.

metaDescription: Replying to customers? Improve clarity, accuracy, and tone of support emails. Ensure professional and empathetic communication.

faq.q: The AI-optimized customer service script feels too stiff, what do I do?
faq.a: Append "keep the conversational feel and emotional warmth of the original script, do not shift to fully written style." Overly formal customer service makes customers feel distanced; preserving warm phrases like "your end" or "we" keeps it more approachable than pure written language.

faq.q: Can it generate scripts in different brand tones (aloof vs. friendly)?
faq.a: Yes. At the start say "brand positioning: high-end luxury, customer base is women 30-50, script must reflect professionalism and prestige." Default AI output is neutral-leaning-warm. Without positioning you get generic scripts that fail to differentiate from competitors.
